channel.title: Projects on TheAnig
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on TheAnig

item.title: Ulam Spiral
item.author: theanig@protonmail.com (TheAnig)
item.description: This project was written in golang, I will fill up more details later. $ h_\theta (x) = \sigma(\theta_0 + \theta_1 x_1 + \theta_2 x_2) $ $ h_\theta (x) = \sigma(\theta_0 + \theta_1 x_1 + \theta_2 x2) $ $$ h\theta (x) = \sigma(\theta_0 + \theta_1 x_1 + \theta_2 x2) $$ $$ h\theta (x) = \sigma(\theta_0 + \theta_1 x_1 + \theta_2 x_2) $$ h_\theta (x) = \sigma(\theta_0 + \theta_1 x_1 + \theta_2 x_2) $$
